0_based_exclusive_e_g_5_to_delete: 0-based, exclusive (e.g., 5 to delete through the fifth row)
add_new_rows_to_the_end_of_a: Add new rows to the end of a Google Sheet without overwriting existing data.
array_of_ranges_that_were_cleared: Array of ranges that were cleared
array_of_update_responses_for_each_range: Array of update responses for each range
array_of_value_ranges_read_from_the_spre: Array of value ranges read from the spreadsheet
cell_range_e_g_a1_d10_defaults_to: Cell range (e.g., A1:D10). Defaults to A1 for write.
column_header_name_to_filter_on_e_g: Column header name to filter on (e.g., Email, Status)
column_header_name_to_filter_the_read_ro: Column header name to filter the read rows on (within the read range)
comma_separated_sheet_names_e_g_sheet1_d: Comma-separated sheet names (e.g., Sheet1, Data, Summary)
comma_separated_sheet_names_for_new_spre: Comma-separated sheet names for new spreadsheet
create_a_new_google_sheets_spreadsheet_w: Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet with named tabs and return its link.
describe_the_data_you_want_to_append: Describe the data you want to append...
describe_the_data_you_want_to_update: Describe the data you want to update...
describe_the_data_you_want_to_write: Describe the data you want to write...
describe_the_range_e_g_all_data_from: Describe the range (e.g., "all data from Sheet1" or "A1 to D50")...
describe_the_range_e_g_first_50_rows: Describe the range (e.g., "first 50 rows" or "column A")...
describe_the_ranges_to_clear_e_g_clear: Describe the ranges to clear (e.g., "clear all data from Sales and Reports, keep headers")...
describe_the_ranges_you_want_to_read_e: Describe the ranges you want to read (e.g., "all data from Sales and summary from Reports")...
describe_the_updates_e_g_set_headers_in: Describe the updates (e.g., "set headers in Sheet1 and add totals in Sheet2")...
description_of_the_deleted_row_range: Description of the deleted row range
end_row_index_0_based_exclusive_for_dele: End row index (0-based, exclusive) for delete rows operation
enter_values_as_json_array_of_arrays_e: Enter values as JSON array of arrays (e.g., [["A1", "B1"], ["A2", "B2"]]) or an array of objects (e.g., [{"name":"John", "age":30}, {"name":"Jane", "age":25}])
filter_summary_present_only_when_a_filte: Filter summary (present only when a filter was requested): applied, column, matchType, columnFound, matchedRows, totalRows
id_of_the_copied_sheet_in_the_destinatio: ID of the copied sheet in the destination, or the sheet the rows were deleted from
id_of_the_spreadsheet_to_copy_to: ID of the spreadsheet to copy to
integrate_google_sheets_into_the_workflo: Integrate Google Sheets into the workflow. Can read, write, append, and update data.
Integrate Google Sheets into the workflow with explicit sheet selection. Can read, write, append, update, clear data, create spreadsheets, get spreadsheet info, and copy sheets.
json_array_of_data_for_batch_update: JSON array of data for batch update
json_array_of_ranges_for_batch_operation: JSON array of ranges for batch operations
json_array_of_ranges_to_clear_e_g: JSON array of ranges to clear (e.g., ["Sheet1!A1:D10", "Sheet2!A1:B5"]). Include sheet name in each range.
json_array_of_ranges_to_read_e_g: JSON array of ranges to read (e.g., ["Sheet1!A1:D10", "Sheet2!A1:B5"]). Include sheet name in each range.
list_of_sheets_in_the_spreadsheet: List of sheets in the spreadsheet
match_type_contains_not_contains_exact_n: Match type: contains, not_contains, exact, not_equals, starts_with, ends_with, gt, gte, lt, or lte
numeric_id_of_the_sheet_tab_use_get: Numeric ID of the sheet/tab (use Get Spreadsheet Info to find IDs)
numeric_id_of_the_sheet_to_copy_use: Numeric ID of the sheet to copy (use Get Spreadsheet Info to find IDs)
numeric_sheet_id_for_copy_operation: Numeric sheet ID for copy operation
numeric_sheet_id_for_delete_rows_sheet_o: Numeric sheet ID for delete rows/sheet operations
read_rows_from_a_google_sheet_optionally: Read rows from a Google Sheet, optionally filtering by a column value.
read_write_and_update_data_with_sheet_se: Read, write, and update data with sheet selection
send_slack_messages_from_google_sheets: Send Slack messages from Google Sheets
sheet_name_and_cell_range_e_g_sheet1: Sheet name and cell range (e.g., Sheet1!A1:D10)
spreadsheet_metadata_including_id_and_ur: Spreadsheet metadata including ID and URL
spreadsheet_title_or_copied_sheet_title_: Spreadsheet title (or copied sheet title for copy_sheet)
start_row_index_0_based_inclusive_for_de: Start row index (0-based, inclusive) for delete rows operation
sync_google_sheets_data_into_notion: Sync Google Sheets data into Notion
the_numeric_id_of_the_deleted_sheet: The numeric ID of the deleted sheet
type_of_the_sheet_grid_chart_etc: Type of the sheet (GRID, CHART, etc.)
value_to_match_against_the_filter_column: Value to match against the filter column
whether_the_spreadsheet_was_successfully: Whether the spreadsheet was successfully deleted
write_or_update_values_in_a_specific_ran: Write or update values in a specific range of a Google Sheet.
